publishedAbstract: This is a multiple error scenario that could be summarized as "GlusterFS health check errors during upgrade process". Resolution Steps error map: 1) Ansible volume health check errors. 2) Mismatch between latest ansible playbooks and 3.9 upgrade documentation. 3) How to fix heketidb brick-multiplexing issues that are frequent with OCS versions < 3.10
publishedTitle: Multiple considerations when upgrading from 3.7 with GlusterFS
